title: betula × rosendahlii
intro: Betula × rosendahlii, also known as the hybrid silver birch, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is a cross between the paper birch (Betula papyrifera) and the downy birch (Betula pubescens). The bark of this plant contains salicin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, making it useful for medicinal purposes. The health benefits of Betula × rosendahlii include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
